events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: cotter pin omitted on castle nut in suspension & steering, in-service. This is a safety-critical defect. Castle nut without cotter pin can back off, causing steering/suspension failure. Decision: fail. Risk: critical. Component conditions: non-compliant, degraded (or failed?). The cotter pin omission is a non-compliance; the joint may be degraded due to potential loosening. Since in-service, likely degraded. Findings and actions.

  "rationale": "A castle nut requires a cotter pin to maintain positive lock; omission is a non-compliant assembly defect.
